title: PvP - Zero
description: Minecraft PvP modpack focused on high FPS, and better hit detection. It has optimization mods, PvP related utility mods, QoL.
body:
# **PvP - Zero** 

> ## Proformance
> This Modpack is a performance focused **Minecraft PvP modpack** made for players to give smoother high FPS gameplay, better hit detection, and clearer FPS during PvP practicing. It includes optimization mods to boost FPS and reduce lag. 
> 
> Info: This Modpack is for **fast, PvP practicing with strong performance and stable high FPS**.
PvP utility mods to help improve PvP awareness and responsiveness. 
> 
> # Mods
- [Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Better Hitreng](https://modrinth.com/project/MIKwzoiY)
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)
- [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
- [Cosmetica](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetica)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)
- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config)
- [Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [HitRange](https://modrinth.com/mod/hitrange)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)
- [Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
- [Shulker Tool Tip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)
- [Thread Tweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)
- [ukulid](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
- [VulkanBobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanbobby)
- [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)

> # Texture Packs:
> PvP texture packs are included.
- Cobweb Outlines
- Visible Shield Cooldown

(May add your own Packs!)

> - I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THESE MODS / TEXTUREPACKS, OR HAVE ANY CONNECTIONS TO THEM.
